heading: Withdrawal liability payment fund
label: 1403 Withdrawal liability payment fund

children.heading: Establishment of or participation in fund by plan sponsors
children.label: a Establishment of or participation in fund by plan sponsors
children.text: The plan sponsors of multiemployer plans may establish or participate in a withdrawal liability payment fund.
is established and maintained under ,section 501(c)(22) of title 26
maintains agreements which cover a substantial portion of the participants who are in multiemployer plans which (under the rules of the trust instrument) are eligible to participate in the fund,
is funded by amounts paid by the plans which participate in the fund, and

children.label: A
children.text: trustees representing employers who are obligated to contribute to the plans participating in the fund, and

children.label: B
children.text: trustees representing employees who are participants in plans which participate in the fund.

children.heading: Payments to plan; amount, criteria, etc.
children.label: c Payments to plan; amount, criteria, etc.
A
children.text: the employer’s unattributable liability,

children.label: B
children.text: the employer’s withdrawal liability payments which would have been due but for section 1388, 1389, 1399, or 1405 of this title,1So in original. Probably should be followed by “and”.1

children.label: C
children.text: the employer’s withdrawal liability payments to the extent they are uncollectible.

children.label: A
children.text: provides for the payment of both the attributable and the unattributable liability of the employer in a single payment, and

children.label: B
children.text: is subrogated to all rights of the plan against the employer.

children.label: i
children.text: the value of vested benefits accrued as a result of service with the employer, over

children.label: ii
children.text: the value of plan assets attributed to the employer, and

children.label: B
children.text: “unattributable liability” means the excess of withdrawal liability over attributable liability.

children.label: i
children.text: any amount described in paragraph (1) and paragraph (2), and

children.label: ii
children.text: reasonable and necessary administrative expenses in connection with the establishment and operation of the trust and the processing of claims against the fund.

children.label: B
children.text: The amounts paid by a plan to a fund shall be deemed a reasonable expense of administering the plan under sections 1103(c)(1) and 1104(a)(1)(A)(ii) of this title, and the payments made by a fund to a participating plan shall be deemed services necessary for the operation of the plan within the meaning of or within the meaning of .section 1108(b)(2) of this titlesection 4975(d)(2) of title 26

children.heading: Application of payments by plan
children.label: d Application of payments by plan
A
children.text: only amounts paid by the fund to a plan under subsection (c)(1)(A) shall be credited to withdrawal liability otherwise payable by the employer, unless the plan otherwise provides, and

children.label: B
children.text: any amounts paid by the fund under subsection (c) to a plan shall be treated by the plan as a payment of withdrawal liability to such plan.

For purposes of applying provisions relating to the funding standard accounts (and minimum contribution requirements), amounts paid from the plan to the fund shall be applied to reduce the amount treated as contributed to the plan.

children.heading: Subrogation of fund to rights of plan
children.label: e Subrogation of fund to rights of plan

children.text: subsection (c)(1)(A), to the extent not credited under subsection (d)(1)(A), and
subsection (c)(1)(C).

children.heading: Discharge of rights of fiduciary of fund; standards applicable, etc.
children.label: f Discharge of rights of fiduciary of fund; standards applicable, etc.
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, a fiduciary of the fund shall discharge the fiduciary’s duties with respect to the fund in accordance with the standards for fiduciaries prescribed by this chapter (to the extent not inconsistent with the purposes of this section), and in accordance with the documents and instruments governing the fund insofar as such documents and instruments are consistent with the provisions of this chapter (to the extent not inconsistent with the purposes of this section). The provisions of the preceding sentence shall supersede any and all State laws relating to fiduciaries insofar as they may now or hereafter relate to a fund to which this section applies.

children.heading: Prohibition on payments from fund to plan where certain labor negotiations involve employer withdrawn or partially withdrawn from plan and continuity of labor organization representing employees continues
children.label: g Prohibition on payments from fund to plan where certain labor negotiations involve employer withdrawn or partially withdrawn from plan and continuity of labor organization representing employees continues
children.text: No payments shall be made from a fund to a plan on the occasion of a withdrawal or partial withdrawal of an employer from such plan if the employees representing the withdrawn contribution base units continue, after such withdrawal, to be represented under (or other applicable labor laws) in negotiations with such employer by the labor organization which represented such employees immediately preceding such withdrawal.section 159 of this title

children.heading: Purchase of insurance by employer
children.label: h Purchase of insurance by employer
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to prohibit the purchase of insurance by an employer from any other person, to limit the circumstances under which such insurance would be payable, or to limit in any way the terms and conditions of such insurance.

children.heading: Promulgation of regulations for establishment and maintenance of fund
children.label: i Promulgation of regulations for establishment and maintenance of fund
children.text: The corporation may provide by regulation rules not inconsistent with this section governing the establishment and maintenance of funds, but only to the extent necessary to carry out the purposes of this part (other than ).section 1402 of this title
